creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
on boot, there are many acpi "bad write" and "bad read" warnings on this
particular machine.  after booting, there are no obvious problems in normal
operation, but it is a barely used test server.

The /var/run/dmesg is here, but it appears truncated.  The fxp0 device doesn't
show, for example.

---START OF DMESG---
